'''âp-s-h''' ('''kapasah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hechsher|hechsher]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hechsher|hechsher]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-s-h
|-
! Lemma
| kapasah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipasah|thipasah]] || [[word:jipasah|jipasah]] || [[word:shipasah|shipasah]] || [[word:kipasah|kipasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupasah|thuthupasah]] || [[word:jujupasah|jujupasah]] || [[word:shushupasah|shushupasah]] || [[word:kukupasah|kukupasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupasah|thupasah]] || [[word:jupasah|jupasah]] || [[word:shupasah|shupasah]] || [[word:kupasah|kupasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupasah|thupasah]] || [[word:jupasah|jupasah]] || [[word:shupasah|shupasah]] || [[word:kupasah|kupasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepasah|thepasah]] || [[word:jepasah|jepasah]] || [[word:shepasah|shepasah]] || [[word:kepasah|kepasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopasah|thothopasah]] || [[word:jojopasah|jojopasah]] || [[word:shoshopasah|shoshopasah]] || [[word:kokopasah|kokopasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasah|thopasah]] || [[word:jopasah|jopasah]] || [[word:shopasah|shopasah]] || [[word:kopasah|kopasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasah|thopasah]] || [[word:jopasah|jopasah]] || [[word:shopasah|shopasah]] || [[word:kopasah|kopasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpasah|thĂŠpasah]] || [[word:jĂŠpasah|jĂŠpasah]] || [[word:shĂŠpasah|shĂŠpasah]] || [[word:kĂŠpasah|kĂŠpasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapasah|thathapasah]] || [[word:jajapasah|jajapasah]] || [[word:shashapasah|shashapasah]] || [[word:kakapasah|kakapasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapasah|thapasah]] || [[word:japasah|japasah]] || [[word:shapasah|shapasah]] || [[word:kapasah|kapasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapasah|thapasah]] || [[word:japasah|japasah]] || [[word:shapasah|shapasah]] || [[word:kapasah|kapasah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapasah|shapasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapasah|goshapasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapasah|gokishapasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapasahnĂŒ|shapasahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapasahnknĂŒ|goshapasahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasahnĂŒ|gokishapasahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapasahshĂ«|shapasahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapasahnkshĂ«|goshapasahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapasahshĂ«|gokishapasahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasahro|shapasahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasahnkro|goshapasahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasahro|gokishapasahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasahmu|shapasahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasahnkmu|goshapasahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasahmu|gokishapasahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapasahsher|shapasahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapasahnksher|goshapasahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapasahsher|gokishapasahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapasahng|shapasahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapasahnkng|goshapasahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapasahng|gokishapasahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapasahya|shapasahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapasahnkya|goshapasahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapasahya|gokishapasahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapasahyam|shapasahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapasahnkyam|goshapasahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapasahyam|gokishapasahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasahnĂŒshĂ«|shapasahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapasahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapasahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasahnĂŒro|shapasahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasahnknĂŒro|goshapasahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasahnĂŒro|gokishapasahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasahnĂŒmu|shapasahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasahnknĂŒmu|goshapasahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasahnĂŒmu|gokishapasahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasahshĂ«nĂŒ|shapasahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapasahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapasahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasahshĂ«ro|shapasahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasahnkshĂ«ro|goshapasahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasahshĂ«ro|gokishapasahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasahshĂ«mu|shapasahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasahnkshĂ«mu|goshapasahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasahshĂ«mu|gokishapasahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasahronĂŒ|shapasahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasahnkronĂŒ|goshapasahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasahronĂŒ|gokishapasahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasahroshĂ«|shapasahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasahnkroshĂ«|goshapasahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasahroshĂ«|gokishapasahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasahromu|shapasahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasahnkromu|goshapasahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasahromu|gokishapasahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasahmunĂŒ|shapasahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasahnkmunĂŒ|goshapasahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasahmunĂŒ|gokishapasahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasahmushĂ«|shapasahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasahnkmushĂ«|goshapasahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasahmushĂ«|gokishapasahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasahmuro|shapasahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasahnkmuro|goshapasahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasahmuro|gokishapasahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
